'''Ben Templesmith''' (b. [[March 7]], [[1978]]) is an Australian graphic artist who inked, colored and penciled the comic "[[Dark Journey (comic story)|Dark Journey]]" in ''[[Star Wars Tales 17]]''. He has also created various book covers, movie posters, trading cards, and concept work for movies.

His most famous work is the comic [[Wikipedia:30 Days of Night|''30 Days of Night'']], which was written by [[Steve Niles]], who also worked on [[Planet of the Dead|a story]] in ''Star Wars Tales 17''.

{{Artist-stub}}
